```{r 4e-status-density-function}
      plot_data$te_lfc[plot_data$status_4e == "4E-sensitive"],
      plot_data$te_lfc[plot_data$status_4e != "4E-sensitive"]
    )
  )

  plot_data <- plot_data %>%
    mutate(status_labeled = case_when(
      status_4e == "4E-resistant" ~ sprintf("4E-resistant (n=%d)", n_resist),
      status_4e == "4E-sensitive" ~ sprintf("4E-sensitive (n=%d)", n_sensit),
      TRUE                        ~ sprintf("Other (n=%d)", n_other)
    ),
    status_labeled = factor(status_labeled,
      levels = c(sprintf("4E-resistant (n=%d)", n_resist),
                 sprintf("4E-sensitive (n=%d)", n_sensit),
                 sprintf("Other (n=%d)", n_other))))

  color_vals <- setNames(
    c("#009E73", "#D55E00", "grey70"),
    c(sprintf("4E-resistant (n=%d)", n_resist),
      sprintf("4E-sensitive (n=%d)", n_sensit),
      sprintf("Other (n=%d)", n_other))
  )

  p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = te_lfc, color = status_labeled)) +
    stat_ecdf(size = 1) +
    scale_color_manual(values = color_vals) +
    labs(title = title_str,
         subtitle = sprintf("KS: resistant vs other p = %.2e; sensitive vs other p = %.2e",
                            ks_res_vs_other$p.value, ks_sens_vs_other$p.value),
         x = "te_lfc (eIF3d effect on translation efficiency)",
         y = "Cumulative proportion",
         color = "4E inhibition status") +
    theme_cowplot() +
    theme(legend.position = "top")+
    xlim(-1,1)

  print(p)
  ggsave(here(paste0("output/", outfile)), width = 8, height = 6)

  cat(title_str, "- KS resistant vs other p:", ks_res_vs_other$p.value, "\n")
  cat(title_str, "- KS sensitive vs other p:", ks_sens_vs_other$p.value, "\n")
  cat("  Median te_lfc resistant:", median(plot_data$te_lfc[plot_data$status_4e == "4E-resistant"], na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
  cat("  Median te_lfc sensitive:", median(plot_data$te_lfc[plot_data$status_4e == "4E-sensitive"], na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
  cat("  Median te_lfc other:",     median(plot_data$te_lfc[plot_data$status_4e == "Other"],         na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
}
```

## Hypoxia - eIF3d

```{r 4e-status-3d-hypoxia-1hr}
plot_3d_telfc_by_4e_status(hyp_3d_1hr,  "Hypoxia 1hr: eIF3d te_lfc by 4E status",  "telfc_4estatus_3d_hyp_1hr.pdf")
```

```{r 4e-status-3d-hypoxia-4hr}
plot_3d_telfc_by_4e_status(hyp_3d_4hr,  "Hypoxia 4hr: eIF3d te_lfc by 4E status",  "telfc_4estatus_3d_hyp_4hr.pdf")
```

```{r 4e-status-3d-hypoxia-24hr}
plot_3d_telfc_by_4e_status(hyp_3d_24hr, "Hypoxia 24hr: eIF3d te_lfc by 4E status", "telfc_4estatus_3d_hyp_24hr.pdf")
```

## Normoxia - eIF3d

```{r 4e-status-3d-normoxia-1hr}
plot_3d_telfc_by_4e_status(norm_3d_1hr,  "Normoxia 1hr: eIF3d te_lfc by 4E status",  "telfc_4estatus_3d_norm_1hr.pdf")
```

```{r 4e-status-3d-normoxia-4hr}
plot_3d_telfc_by_4e_status(norm_3d_4hr,  "Normoxia 4hr: eIF3d te_lfc by 4E status",  "telfc_4estatus_3d_norm_4hr.pdf")
```

```{r 4e-status-3d-normoxia-24hr}
plot_3d_telfc_by_4e_status(norm_3d_24hr, "Normoxia 24hr: eIF3d te_lfc by 4E status", "telfc_4estatus_3d_norm_24hr.pdf")
```

# ECDF of te_lfc colored by IP enrichment status

## Build IP status lookup tables

```{r ip-status-inhib-v-vehicle}
ip_status_inhib_v_vehicle <- teleman_IP_4E_inhib_v_vehicle %>%
  filter(!is.na(symbol)) %>%
  group_by(symbol) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = baseMean, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(ip_status = case_when(
    log2FoldChange > 1  & padj < 0.05 ~ "IP-enriched",
    log2FoldChange < -1 & padj < 0.05 ~ "IP-depleted",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  )) %>%
  dplyr::select(symbol, ip_status)

cat("IP status counts (inhib vs vehicle):\n")
print(table(ip_status_inhib_v_vehicle$ip_status))
```

```{r ip-status-vehicle}
ip_status_vehicle <- teleman_IP_4E_vehicle %>%
  filter(!is.na(symbol)) %>%
  group_by(symbol) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = baseMean, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(ip_status = case_when(
    log2FoldChange > 1  & padj < 0.05 ~ "IP-enriched",
    log2FoldChange < -1 & padj < 0.05 ~ "IP-depleted",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  )) %>%
  dplyr::select(symbol, ip_status)

cat("IP status counts (vehicle):\n")
print(table(ip_status_vehicle$ip_status))
```

```{r ip-status-inhib}
ip_status_inhib <- teleman_IP_4E_inhib %>%
  filter(!is.na(symbol)) %>%
  group_by(symbol) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = baseMean, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(ip_status = case_when(
    log2FoldChange > 1  & padj < 0.05 ~ "IP-enriched",
    log2FoldChange < -1 & padj < 0.05 ~ "IP-depleted",
    TRUE ~ "Other"
  )) %>%
  dplyr::select(symbol, ip_status)

cat("IP status counts (inhib):\n")
print(table(ip_status_inhib$ip_status))
```

## Helper function

```{r ip-status-ecdf-function}
plot_telfc_by_ip_status <- function(data_3d, ip_status_tbl, title_str, outfile) {
  status_levels <- c("IP-enriched", "IP-depleted", "Other")

  plot_data <- data_3d %>%
    filter(!is.na(symbol), !is.na(te_lfc)) %>%
    left_join(ip_status_tbl, by = "symbol") %>%
    mutate(ip_status = replace_na(ip_status, "Other"),
           ip_status = factor(ip_status, levels = status_levels))

  n_enriched <- sum(plot_data$ip_status == "IP-enriched")
  n_depleted <- sum(plot_data$ip_status == "IP-depleted")
  n_other    <- sum(plot_data$ip_status == "Other")

  ks_enrich_vs_other <- suppressWarnings(
    ks.test(
      plot_data$te_lfc[plot_data$ip_status == "IP-enriched"],
      plot_data$te_lfc[plot_data$ip_status != "IP-enriched"]
    )
  )

  ks_deplete_vs_other <- suppressWarnings(
    ks.test(
      plot_data$te_lfc[plot_data$ip_status == "IP-depleted"],
      plot_data$te_lfc[plot_data$ip_status != "IP-depleted"]
    )
  )

  plot_data <- plot_data %>%
    mutate(status_labeled = case_when(
      ip_status == "IP-enriched" ~ sprintf("IP-enriched (n=%d)", n_enriched),
      ip_status == "IP-depleted" ~ sprintf("IP-depleted (n=%d)", n_depleted),
      TRUE                       ~ sprintf("Other (n=%d)", n_other)
    ),
    status_labeled = factor(status_labeled,
      levels = c(sprintf("IP-enriched (n=%d)", n_enriched),
                 sprintf("IP-depleted (n=%d)", n_depleted),
                 sprintf("Other (n=%d)", n_other))))

  color_vals <- setNames(
    c("#009E73", "#D55E00", "grey70"),
    c(sprintf("IP-enriched (n=%d)", n_enriched),
      sprintf("IP-depleted (n=%d)", n_depleted),
      sprintf("Other (n=%d)", n_other))
  )

  p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = te_lfc, color = status_labeled)) +
    stat_ecdf(size = 1) +
    scale_color_manual(values = color_vals) +
    labs(title = title_str,
         subtitle = sprintf("KS: enriched vs other p = %.2e; depleted vs other p = %.2e",
                            ks_enrich_vs_other$p.value, ks_deplete_vs_other$p.value),
         x = "te_lfc (eIF3d effect on translation efficiency)",
         y = "Cumulative proportion",
         color = "IP enrichment status") +
    theme_cowplot() +
    theme(legend.position = "top") +
    xlim(-1, 1)

  print(p)
  ggsave(here(paste0("output/", outfile)), width = 8, height = 6)

  cat(title_str, "- KS enriched vs other p:", ks_enrich_vs_other$p.value, "\n")
  cat(title_str, "- KS depleted vs other p:", ks_deplete_vs_other$p.value, "\n")
  cat("  Median te_lfc enriched:", median(plot_data$te_lfc[plot_data$ip_status == "IP-enriched"], na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
  cat("  Median te_lfc depleted:", median(plot_data$te_lfc[plot_data$ip_status == "IP-depleted"], na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
  cat("  Median te_lfc other:",    median(plot_data$te_lfc[plot_data$ip_status == "Other"],        na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
}
```

## Hypoxia - eIF3d × IP status

### Inhibitor vs vehicle

```{r ip-status-inhibvvehicle-hyp-1hr}
plot_telfc_by_ip_status(hyp_3d_1hr,  ip_status_inhib_v_vehicle, "Hypoxia 1hr: eIF3d te_lfc by IP status (inhib vs vehicle)",  "telfc_ipstatus_inhibvvehicle_3d_hyp_1hr.pdf")
```

```{r ip-status-inhibvvehicle-hyp-4hr}
plot_telfc_by_ip_status(hyp_3d_4hr,  ip_status_inhib_v_vehicle, "Hypoxia 4hr: eIF3d te_lfc by IP status (inhib vs vehicle)",  "telfc_ipstatus_inhibvvehicle_3d_hyp_4hr.pdf")
```

```{r ip-status-inhibvvehicle-hyp-24hr}
plot_telfc_by_ip_status(hyp_3d_24hr, ip_status_inhib_v_vehicle, "Hypoxia 24hr: eIF3d te_lfc by IP status (inhib vs vehicle)", "telfc_ipstatus_inhibvvehicle_3d_hyp_24hr.pdf")
```

### Vehicle

```{r ip-status-vehicle-hyp-1hr}
plot_telfc_by_ip_status(hyp_3d_1hr,  ip_status_vehicle, "Hypoxia 1hr: eIF3d te_lfc by IP status (vehicle)",  "telfc_ipstatus_vehicle_3d_hyp_1hr.pdf")
```

```{r ip-status-vehicle-hyp-4hr}
plot_telfc_by_ip_status(hyp_3d_4hr,  ip_status_vehicle, "Hypoxia 4hr: eIF3d te_lfc by IP status (vehicle)",  "telfc_ipstatus_vehicle_3d_hyp_4hr.pdf")
```

```{r ip-status-vehicle-hyp-24hr}
plot_telfc_by_ip_status(hyp_3d_24hr, ip_status_vehicle, "Hypoxia 24hr: eIF3d te_lfc by IP status (vehicle)", "telfc_ipstatus_vehicle_3d_hyp_24hr.pdf")
```

### Inhibitor

```{r ip-status-inhib-hyp-1hr}
plot_telfc_by_ip_status(hyp_3d_1hr,  ip_status_inhib, "Hypoxia 1hr: eIF3d te_lfc by IP status (inhib)",  "telfc_ipstatus_inhib_3d_hyp_1hr.pdf")
```

```{r ip-status-inhib-hyp-4hr}
plot_telfc_by_ip_status(hyp_3d_4hr,  ip_status_inhib, "Hypoxia 4hr: eIF3d te_lfc by IP status (inhib)",  "telfc_ipstatus_inhib_3d_hyp_4hr.pdf")
```

```{r ip-status-inhib-hyp-24hr}
plot_telfc_by_ip_status(hyp_3d_24hr, ip_status_inhib, "Hypoxia 24hr: eIF3d te_lfc by IP status (inhib)", "telfc_ipstatus_inhib_3d_hyp_24hr.pdf")
```

## Normoxia - eIF3d × IP status

### Inhibitor vs vehicle

```{r ip-status-inhibvvehicle-norm-1hr}
plot_telfc_by_ip_status(norm_3d_1hr,  ip_status_inhib_v_vehicle, "Normoxia 1hr: eIF3d te_lfc by IP status (inhib vs vehicle)",  "telfc_ipstatus_inhibvvehicle_3d_norm_1hr.pdf")
```

```{r ip-status-inhibvvehicle-norm-4hr}
plot_telfc_by_ip_status(norm_3d_4hr,  ip_status_inhib_v_vehicle, "Normoxia 4hr: eIF3d te_lfc by IP status (inhib vs vehicle)",  "telfc_ipstatus_inhibvvehicle_3d_norm_4hr.pdf")
```

```{r ip-status-inhibvvehicle-norm-24hr}
plot_telfc_by_ip_status(norm_3d_24hr, ip_status_inhib_v_vehicle, "Normoxia 24hr: eIF3d te_lfc by IP status (inhib vs vehicle)", "telfc_ipstatus_inhibvvehicle_3d_norm_24hr.pdf")
```

### Vehicle

```{r ip-status-vehicle-norm-1hr}
plot_telfc_by_ip_status(norm_3d_1hr,  ip_status_vehicle, "Normoxia 1hr: eIF3d te_lfc by IP status (vehicle)",  "telfc_ipstatus_vehicle_3d_norm_1hr.pdf")
```

```{r ip-status-vehicle-norm-4hr}
plot_telfc_by_ip_status(norm_3d_4hr,  ip_status_vehicle, "Normoxia 4hr: eIF3d te_lfc by IP status (vehicle)",  "telfc_ipstatus_vehicle_3d_norm_4hr.pdf")
```

```{r ip-status-vehicle-norm-24hr}
plot_telfc_by_ip_status(norm_3d_24hr, ip_status_vehicle, "Normoxia 24hr: eIF3d te_lfc by IP status (vehicle)", "telfc_ipstatus_vehicle_3d_norm_24hr.pdf")
```

### Inhibitor

```{r ip-status-inhib-norm-1hr}
plot_telfc_by_ip_status(norm_3d_1hr,  ip_status_inhib, "Normoxia 1hr: eIF3d te_lfc by IP status (inhib)",  "telfc_ipstatus_inhib_3d_norm_1hr.pdf")
```

```{r ip-status-inhib-norm-4hr}
plot_telfc_by_ip_status(norm_3d_4hr,  ip_status_inhib, "Normoxia 4hr: eIF3d te_lfc by IP status (inhib)",  "telfc_ipstatus_inhib_3d_norm_4hr.pdf")
```

```{r ip-status-inhib-norm-24hr}
plot_telfc_by_ip_status(norm_3d_24hr, ip_status_inhib, "Normoxia 24hr: eIF3d te_lfc by IP status (inhib)", "telfc_ipstatus_inhib_3d_norm_24hr.pdf")
```
